message.snippet: Hi there, Thanks for reaching out about MarianneAI. We appreciate your message. Our team is currently handling many public-data requests, so the automatic answer service is temporarily busy. Your
message.plain_text_body:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out about MarianneAI. We appreciate your message.

Our team is currently handling many public-data requests, so the automatic answer service is temporarily busy. Your request is captured and will be handled manually.

Current status: No ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL configured. Sending temporary busy response.

Please try again in a few minutes, and we will respond properly.

If this is urgent, resend with subject [urgent] and we will keep the ticket open.

Kind regards,
MarianneAI Support

classification.reasoning: The email appears to be an automated system error or bounce message ('No ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL configured') triggered by a user's attempt to query MarianneAI about French company data, indicating an operational failure or bug in the auto-responder system.

intent.task_title: Request for data about a company in France
intent.intent_summary: The user attempted to query MarianneAI for public data concerning a French company. The request was intercepted by an automated system error (missing ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL), but the underlying intent remains gathering corporate public data.
intent.requested_outcome: To receive public data and information about a specific company or companies in France.
intent.task_description: Follow up with the user to apologize for the automated system failure and manually handle their request for French company data. Prompt the user to specify the exact company and the type of data they need.
missing_information: Specific company name or SIREN/SIRET number
Specific data points required (e.g., registration details, financials, leadership)

assessment.rationale: The user is asking for data about a French company but failed to specify which company, making the core task impossible to execute without further clarification. Additionally, the email contains a system error ('No ANSWER_ENDPOINT_URL configured') indicating a bug that needs human attention.
missing_information: Specific company name or SIREN/SIRET number

message.snippet: Hi there, Thanks for reaching out about MarianneAI. We appreciate your message. Our team is currently handling many public-data requests, so the automatic answer service is temporarily busy. Your
message.plain_text_body:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out about MarianneAI. We appreciate your message.

Our team is currently handling many public-data requests, so the automatic answer service is temporarily busy. Your request is captured and will be handled manually.

Current status: datagouv mcp failed: Datagouv MCP call failed: https://mcp.data.gouv.fr/mcp - HTTP status client error (406 Not Acceptable) for url (https://mcp.data.gouv.fr/mcp)

Please try again in a few minutes, and we will respond properly.

If this is urgent, resend with subject [urgent] and we will keep the ticket open.

Kind regards,
MarianneAI Support

classification.reasoning: The email contains an error trace regarding a failed connection to the data.gouv.fr MCP (406 Not Acceptable) after a user attempted to query data about companies in France.

intent.task_title: Fix MCP 406 Error / French Company Data Request
intent.intent_summary: The user attempted to query MarianneAI for public data regarding companies in France, but the request failed due to an HTTP 406 Not Acceptable error from the data.gouv.fr MCP integration.
intent.requested_outcome: Resolution of the MCP connection error so the user can successfully receive the requested public data about French companies.
intent.task_description: Investigate and resolve the '406 Not Acceptable' HTTP client error occurring when connecting to the data.gouv.fr MCP (https://mcp.data.gouv.fr/mcp). Once the integration is fixed, process the user's original query for French company data.
missing_information: Specific company name(s) or SIREN/SIRET numbers
Exact data points requested (e.g., financial records, registration status, sector)

assessment.rationale: The email provides a specific, actionable bug report detailing an HTTP 406 Not Acceptable error when connecting to the core data.gouv.fr MCP integration, which blocks public data queries.

message.plain_text_body:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out about MarianneAI. We appreciate your message.

Our team is currently handling many public-data requests, so the automatic answer service is temporarily busy. Your request is captured and will be handled manually.

Current status: datagouv mcp failed: Datagouv MCP call failed: https://mcp.data.gouv.fr/mcp - HTTP status client error (406 Not Acceptable) for url (https://mcp.data.gouv.fr/mcp)

Please try again in a few minutes, and we will respond properly.

If this is urgent, resend with subject [urgent] and we will keep the ticket open.

Kind regards,
MarianneAI Support

classification.reasoning: The email contains an error traceback (HTTP 406 Not Acceptable) indicating a failure with the datagouv MCP integration when querying French company data.

intent.task_title: Fix HTTP 406 datagouv MCP error for company data query
intent.intent_summary: The user wants to retrieve data about a company in France, but their request triggered an HTTP 406 Not Acceptable error from the datagouv MCP integration.
intent.requested_outcome: The 406 error is resolved so the user can successfully query and receive public data about French companies.
intent.task_description: Investigate and resolve the 'HTTP 406 Not Acceptable' error occurring at the datagouv MCP endpoint (https://mcp.data.gouv.fr/mcp). The bug was triggered by a user querying for French company data. Check the request formatting, specifically the 'Accept' headers and payload compatibility with the data.gouv.fr API.
missing_information: The specific company name or SIREN/SIRET the user was searching for
The exact request payload and headers sent to the MCP endpoint that triggered the 406 error

assessment.rationale: The email reports a specific and actionable bug (HTTP 406 Not Acceptable error) occurring at a known endpoint (datagouv MCP) during a core use case (querying French company data). It provides sufficient context to queue a developer task to investigate API request headers and payload compatibility.
missing_information: The specific company name or SIREN/SIRET the user was searching for
The exact request payload and headers sent to the MCP endpoint
